name: Ikat Green Oversized Jumbo Beach Towel - Threshold™
description:
Enjoy a day of sunny beachside fun with this Ikat Green Jumbo Beach Towel from Threshold™. Made from 100% cotton, this oversized bath towel feels soft against your skin and helps you dry off quickly. Great for spreading on the sand or a chaise lounge, it features an ikat pattern in green, blue and tan hues on a cream background for a vibrant look, while fringed trim finishes the design with extra flair.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
